title: FillChart
description: POST /api/FillChart — Fills a chart in a PPTX template with new categories and series data. Send as multipart/form-data with a 'template' file field (.pptx) and a 'chartData' text field containing this JSON.

shapeName.description: The name of the chart shape on the slide (visible in PowerPoint's Selection Pane, e.g. 'Content Placeholder 7' or 'Diagramm 1'). Case-insensitive matching.

categories.description: Category labels for the chart's X-axis (or pie slices).

series.description: One or more data series to populate the chart.

name.description: Display name of the data series (shown in the chart legend).

values.description: Numeric data points. Must have the same length as 'categories'.
